scripts.preinstall: node -e "try{require('fs').unlinkSync('package-lock.json')}catch(_){} try{require('fs').unlinkSync('yarn.lock')}catch(_){} const u=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!u.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npx --yes pnpm@9 run typecheck && npx --yes pnpm@9 -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: npx --yes pnpm@9 run typecheck:libs && npx --yes pnpm@9 -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
